generationTool: OpenAI ImageGen built-in — un appel distinct
generationPolicy: Un appel ImageGen distinct par personnage. Les armes et accessoires de combat restent des sprites séparés et chaque weaponId résout une entrée de weapons.json.

entries.name: Gunsō Croc de Fer
entries.subtitle: Capitaine ashigaru
lore: Le gunsō ferma la route de Kurokawa jusqu’à ce que la fièvre gagne toute sa section.
Même contaminé, il maintient sa formation et punit quiconque franchit la portée de sa lance.
entries.pattern: Garde haute, estoc retardé et contre immédiat après une attaque bloquée.

phases.name: Ligne fermée
phases.behaviour: Estocs mesurés et pas de garde.

phases.name: Croc brisé
phases.behaviour: Enchaînements plus courts et charge d’épaule.

entries.gameplay: 260 PV, 24 dégâts, vitesse 0.92. Garde haute, estoc retardé et contre immédiat après une attaque bloquée.

entries.name: Rōnin de Kurogane
entries.subtitle: Duelliste sans maître
lore: Ce rōnin vendit sa lame aux convois de quarantaine avant de disparaître dans les cols.
La peste a conservé son instinct du duel, mais effacé le nom du maître qu’il cherche encore.
entries.pattern: Marche lente, feinte de dégainé puis coupe longue qui traverse la garde.

phases.name: Acier sans nom
phases.behaviour: Deux dashs suivis d’une coupe verticale.

entries.gameplay: 230 PV, 31 dégâts, vitesse 1.18. Marche lente, feinte de dégainé puis coupe longue qui traverse la garde.

entries.name: Sōhei aux Cent Prières
entries.subtitle: Moine guerrier corrompu
lore: Il récita cent prières devant la cloche de Kurotaki sans parvenir à contenir la souillure.
Chaque nœud de sa robe marque désormais un frère tombé qu’il croit encore protéger.

entries.subtitle: Gardienne du sanctuaire lunaire
lore: La miko resta seule pour sceller les pavillons du sanctuaire de Tsukikage.
Son chant s’est changé en souffle malade qui affaiblit les vivants à chaque pas.

entries.name: Hatamoto Inazuma
entries.subtitle: Retainer de l’éclair
lore: Inazuma avait juré de tenir le pavillon du shogun même si la garnison tombait.
Son serment survit à son esprit et sa garde fulgurante rejette toute attaque frontale.

entries.name: Gardien au Masque de Fer

entries.subtitle: Capitaine des crêtes
lore: Le Faucon guidait les messagers par les crêtes lorsque les routes furent condamnées.
La foudre frappa son poste d’observation après sa contamination et grava sa dernière trajectoire.
entries.pattern: Bond vertical, plongeon diagonal et balayage de nagamaki à la réception.
entries.gameplay: 255 PV, 30 dégâts, vitesse 1.36. Bond vertical, plongeon diagonal et balayage de nagamaki à la réception.
entries.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: production animation master sprite sheet for one modular 2D miniboss in Yomi no Kage
Primary request: create exactly one original miniboss character, the "Faucon de l’Orage", a plague-infected mountain scout captain from Kan’ei-era Japan, 1638. He has a lean long-legged build, a low swept-back black helmet with a modest beak-shaped brow plate, a narrow aged-bone lower-face guard, fitted deep-indigo lamellar armor, one long asymmetrical lacquer-red shoulder mantle cut into layered cloth points, close black sleeves, pale leg wraps and restrained sick-green contamination around the eyes and one shoulder seam. His silhouette is forward-leaning and aerodynamic through period armor tailoring only, with no wings, feathers, bird anatomy or graphic gore.
Animation layout: ONE SINGLE MASTER SHEET arranged as an exact invisible grid of 6 columns by 5 rows, exactly 30 equal cells, read left to right. Row 1 contains six coherent alert idle frames. Row 2 contains six coherent movement frames for a long bounding sprint. Row 3 contains six coherent EMPTY-HANDED attack frames using a rising leap, diving shoulder strike and low recovery, with no wind or lightning effect. Row 4 contains six coherent hurt/recoil frames. Row 5 contains six coherent death/collapse frames ending prone. Do not draw grid lines, cell borders, panels, labels, numbers or separators.
Character consistency: every cell depicts the exact same single character, identical face guard, helmet, armor, mantle, colors, proportions and scale. Strict orthographic side view facing LEFT in all 30 cells. Full body and feet visible in every cell, centered inside each invisible cell with generous internal padding, same ground baseline and camera height, no cropping, no overlap into neighboring cells.
Weapon modularity: BOTH HANDS COMPLETELY EMPTY in every frame. Absolutely no nagamaki, weapon, blade, polearm, bow, firearm, shield, feather, tool, object, scabbard, pouch, holster or carried prop anywhere on the body or in the sheet.
Style/medium: highly finished authentic 16-bit pixel art, deliberately chunky square pixels, hard crisp pixel clusters, limited palette, no antialiasing, no smooth vector edges, no painterly rendering, readable at small gameplay scale.
Color palette: ink black, deep indigo, aged bone, lacquer red, cold gray and restrained sick green. Do not use magenta or pink in the character.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background, uniform edge to edge and throughout all spacing between cells.
Constraints: background must contain no shadow, gradient, texture, floor plane, reflection, glow, wind trails, lightning, particles or lighting variation. No cast/contact shadows. No scenery, architecture, ground, extra character, duplicate outside the 30 cells, text, logo, watermark or UI. Historically grounded 1638 Japanese armor, no modern elements, no fantasy anatomy, no graphic gore.
entries.generationTool: OpenAI ImageGen built-in — un appel distinct

entries.name: Capitaine Byakko
entries.subtitle: Commandant du Tigre blanc
lore: Byakko mena la dernière compagnie envoyée pour reprendre le château sans attendre les renforts.
Son armure ivoire porte les traces de toute l’unité, absorbée par la peste au pied des murailles.
entries.pattern: Posture de commandement, parade haute, dash de tachi et onde de peur à mi-vie.

phases.name: Compagnie blanche
phases.behaviour: Duel défensif et ordres de zone.

phases.name: Dernier capitaine
phases.behaviour: Dashs doublés et ripostes sans recul.

entries.gameplay: 390 PV, 37 dégâts, vitesse 1.12. Posture de commandement, parade haute, dash de tachi et onde de peur à mi-vie.
entries.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: production animation master sprite sheet for one modular 2D miniboss in Yomi no Kage
Primary request: create exactly one original miniboss character, the "Capitaine Byakko", a plague-infected shogunate assault captain from Kan’ei-era Japan, 1638. He has a broad athletic build, a compact aged-ivory lacquer kabuto with a restrained red crest, segmented bone-white dō-maru armor painted with sparse ink-black tiger-stripe geometry, deep-indigo underclothes, lacquer-red lacing, one heavier black shoulder plate, a stern menpō lowered beneath the face and restrained sick-green contamination at the eyes and armor seams. His silhouette is balanced, commanding and distinct from the existing daimyō, with no literal tiger anatomy and no graphic gore.
Animation layout: ONE SINGLE MASTER SHEET arranged as an exact invisible grid of 6 columns by 5 rows, exactly 30 equal cells, read left to right. Row 1 contains six coherent commanding idle frames. Row 2 contains six coherent movement frames for a powerful disciplined advance. Row 3 contains six coherent EMPTY-HANDED attack frames using a guarded step, crushing forearm strike and tiger-like low pounce performed with normal human hands, with no effect. Row 4 contains six coherent hurt/recoil frames. Row 5 contains six coherent death/collapse frames ending prone. Do not draw grid lines, cell borders, panels, labels, numbers or separators.
Character consistency: every cell depicts the exact same single character, identical face, helmet, armor, colors, proportions and scale. Strict orthographic side view facing LEFT in all 30 cells. Full body and feet visible in every cell, centered inside each invisible cell with generous internal padding, same ground baseline and camera height, no cropping, no overlap into neighboring cells.
Weapon modularity: BOTH HANDS COMPLETELY EMPTY in every frame. Absolutely no katana, weapon, blade, polearm, bow, firearm, shield, claw weapon, tool, object, scabbard, holster or carried prop anywhere on the body or in the sheet.
Style/medium: highly finished authentic 16-bit pixel art, deliberately chunky square pixels, hard crisp pixel clusters, limited palette, no antialiasing, no smooth vector edges, no painterly rendering, readable at small gameplay scale.
Color palette: aged ivory, ink black, deep indigo, lacquer red, dark iron and restrained sick green. Do not use magenta or pink in the character.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background, uniform edge to edge and throughout all spacing between cells.
Constraints: background must contain no shadow, gradient, texture, floor plane, reflection, glow, claw trails, particles or lighting variation. No cast/contact shadows. No scenery, architecture, ground, extra character, duplicate outside the 30 cells, text, logo, watermark or UI. Historically grounded 1638 Japanese armor, no modern elements, no fantasy anatomy, no resemblance to a named existing franchise character, no graphic gore.

entries.name: Kannushi du réseau Yomi
entries.subtitle: Officiant des mémoires contaminées
lore: Ce prêtre-réseau entretenait les mémoires rituelles de Neo-Tokyo avant que le Yomi n’infecte les archives.
Il récite maintenant les derniers instants des morts sous forme de commandes qui verrouillent l’espace.
entries.pattern: Glyphes de verrouillage, téléportation entre relais et frappes de shakujo holographique séparé.
entries.prompt: Planche maître originale du Kannushi du réseau Yomi, prêtre-hacker cyberpunk en grille 5 x 6 strictement latérale gauche. Les cinq lignes sont idle, glisse, attaque rituelle à mains vides, impact et mort. Même visage, halo et robes dans toutes les frames, mains vides, holo-shakujo séparé, fond chroma vert uniforme, aucun texte ni décor.
entries.generationTool: OpenAI ImageGen built-in
